title: Kushner and Witkoff Traveling to Pakistan to Resume Iran Talks
summary_full: Iran’s foreign minister has already arrived in the country, state media reported. He was believed to be carrying a written response to a U.S. proposal to end the war.
summary_public: Iran’s foreign minister has already arrived in the country, state media reported. He was believed to be carrying a written response to a U.S. proposal to end the war.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran’s foreign minister has already arrived... to end the war.
